meaning: 拉帕汉诺克河[美国弗吉尼亚州东北部](注入切萨皮克湾)
examples: Spring rains were beginning to make the Rappahannock rise.
That was because she had Indian blood Cherokee from her father and Rappahannock from her mother as well as black.
The fighting was taking place on the south side of the Rappahannock River. The Union army's supply lines were on the north side.
Move south across the Rappahannock River towards Richmond, however, and it's a different story.
When those efforts failed to deter the approaching vessel, the security team on the Rappahannock fired rounds from a .50-caliber machine gun.
